name: DoorDash Drive API
description: DoorDash Drive is a delivery-as-a-service platform that allows businesses to request on-demand deliveries powered by DoorDash's Dasher network. The API enables creating deliveries, obtaining delivery quotes, managing businesses and stores, and receiving real-time delivery status updates via webhooks.
